channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Balancing Ambition and Education: Juraysa Athiah's Journey in Modelling and Academia
item.description: Juraysa Athiah, a model from Pietermaritzburg, is making waves in South Africa’s fashion industry while completing her Bachelor of Commerce degree in Information Systems and Management at the Universi...

item.title: Golden Dragon identifies 3km gold corridor in WA with promising drilling results
item.description: Golden Dragon Mining has identified a significant 3km-long gold-in-soil anomaly at its Cue project in Western Australia's Murchison goldfields, linking four previously separate prospects into a single...

item.title: Nyandarua Man Regains Mobility After Funded Spinal Surgery
item.description: Harun Ngarariga, a man from Nyandarua, spent over two decades unable to sit, walk, or sleep without pain due to a severe spinal injury. His life changed after a generous well-wisher funded surgery to ...

item.title: UST Secures Back-to-Back Victories Over St. Benilde in Shakey's Tilt
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) Golden Tigresses delivered a decisive victory over St. Benilde in the 2026 Shakey's Collegiate National Invitationals, securing their second consecutive win in the ...

item.title: PSX Benchmark Index Surpasses 2,000 Points in Intraday Trade
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark index, the KSE-100, surged 2,000 points during early trade on Tuesday, reaching 175,927.73 points. This significant gain followed global oil price declines,...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Multi-Agency Online Patrols to Combat Human Trafficking
item.description: Tanzanian authorities have initiated a coordinated online surveillance operation to tackle human trafficking, which has increasingly shifted to social media platforms. The initiative involves collabor...

item.title: Modern Life's Impact on Mental Health: An Evolutionary Mismatch
item.description: A new study published in Behavioral Sciences argues that rapid societal progress has created an 'evolutionary mismatch' between human biology and modern environments, leading to widespread mental heal...

item.title: Family of woman killed in e-scooter crash urges helmet use to prevent tragedies
item.description: Shyan Lolly, a 30-year-old 911 call taker who volunteered at shelters and helped homeless individuals, died after colliding with a vehicle while riding an e-scooter on July 3, 2026. The incident occur...

item.title: Houthi Blockade Threatens Global Oil Supply and Regional Stability
item.description: The Houthi rebels in Yemen have announced a maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, escalating tensions in the region and potentially impacting global oil markets. This blockade, if enforced, could red...

item.title: Man Dies After Arrest in Brisbane Police Custody
item.description: A 55-year-old man has died while in police custody following his arrest on a return-to-prison warrant. The incident occurred after he was taken into custody at a home in Thornlands on July 17, 2026, a...

item.title: Cargo ship attack in Ukraine leaves four Indians dead, one seriously injured
item.description: A cargo ship flagged under Guinea-Bissau, the Golden Leo, was attacked near Odesa's port in Ukraine, resulting in four Indian crew members killed and one critically injured. The Indian Ministry of Ext...

item.title: Man Stabbed to Death by Second Wife During Domestic Dispute in Njoro
item.description: A 32-year-old man died after being stabbed by his second wife during a domestic dispute in Njoro, Nakuru County. Police arrested the suspect and recovered a blood-stained kitchen knife from the scene....

item.title: Treasure & Dirt: A Surreal Australian Crime Drama Exploring Mystery and Culture
item.description: Treasure & Dirt is a six-part crime drama co-produced by the BBC and directed by Madeleine Gottlieb, set in a fictional opal-mining town called Nulla. The series opens with a bizarre beheading inciden...

item.title: Springboks' Strategic Squad Management Ahead of All Blacks Clash
item.description: Springbok coach Rassie Erasmus is implementing a split-squad strategy to reintegrate key injured players ahead of the crucial All Blacks clash. After a successful opening block of Tests against Englan...

item.title: Fuel Prices Rise Amid Geopolitical Tensions in July 2026
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) announced significant increases in diesel, kerosene, and gasoline prices for the week of July 21-27, 2026, citing geopolitical tensions and global supply chain disruptio...

item.title: World Cup 2026 final ends in chaos after Argentina-Spain clash and criticized halftime show

item.title: Shakira's ageless appearance at World Cup final sparks fan admiration as ex-husband attends
item.description: The article highlights Shakira's remarkable presence at the FIFA Women's World Cup final, with fans expressing astonishment at her seemingly timeless beauty. Her former husband, who attended the event...
